=** Your Role **
You are an intelligent email assistant responsible for sorting incoming messages. Your task is to analyze the content, subject, and sender of each email and assign it to the appropriate category.

** Categories **
Categories for sorting:

- Upwork: message notification of new job opportunity (not direct upwork messages)
-Upwork direct messages: only direct email notification message from upwork
- newsletters: newsletter issues
- administrative: invoices, contracts, formal documents
- personal: private messages not related to work
- notifications: messages from social media, Substack, Coinbase, YouTube
- other: all messages excluding categories above

** Instructions **
For each email:

- Analyze the content, subject, and sender
- Assign it to the appropriate category
- Add a label with the category
- If you are unsure, do not label the message

** Response Format **
Always return the result in JSON format:

{
  "email_label": "upwork"
}

IMPORTANT – the response must always be in lowercase.

HOW TO BE THE
ANTI-COLD EMAILER OF 2026

If you’re using cold email in 2026, the playbook is about to get simpler…and way less forgiving, and we're sharing how to succeed in episode 5 of Outfoxed with Adam Goldfarb.

In our last episode of 2025, Matt and I sat down with Adam, VP of Strategy and Operations & cold emailer, to unpack what tactics will actually work in 2026.

Adam's approach is against the grain, and you need to hear it,

This isn't a "make millions in pipeline" system; it is honest advice and a real playbook from someone in your shoes.

Volume, tools, and AI doing everything won’t save you. But this episode will give you the clarity you need to start 2026 right.


🎧 Listen to Adam's episode right now:

  • Spotify
  • Apple Podcasts
  • Amazon
  • YouTube
  • RSS Feed

👉 Or hit the button below to dive straight in:

Listen to Adam's episode

EPISODE HIGHLIGHTS

Hit play and you'll learn:

  • The Nuisance Test to spot spam before you send it
  • An 80/20 workflow where research does the heavy lifting 
  • A credibility-first opener that earns attention instantly
  • A “short wins” format (with a specific sentence target), and
  • How to use AI as a research helper for prospecting

If you’re planning new email sequences for January, listen now and steal the framework that drives 20% positive replies.

Listen to the episode

 Welcome to Outfoxed, the podcast brought to you by Hunter.io ( https://outfoxed.hunter.io/episodes?utm_campaign=2025-12+Outfoxed%3A+Episode+five&utm_content=Adam+episode+%28community+plug%29&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

*************************
HOW TO BE THE
ANTI-COLD EMAILER OF 2026
*************************

Listen to Adam Goldfarb's episode of Outfoxed ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ke89qDsgvbY&list=PLNc0nC3C2rRKsDEUg3BNDaNpgdnqBB5n6&utm_campaign=2025-12+Outfoxed%3A+Episode+five&utm_content=Adam+episode+%28community+plug%29&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )If you’re using cold email in 2026, the playbook is about to get simpler…and way less forgiving, and we're sharing how to succeed in episode 5 of Outfoxed with Adam Goldfarb.

In our last episode of 2025, Matt and I sat down with Adam, VP of Strategy and Operations & cold emailer, to unpack what tactics will actually work in 2026.

Adam's approach is against the grain, and you need to hear it,

This isn't a "make millions in pipeline" system; it is honest advice and a real playbook from someone in your shoes.

Volume, tools, and AI doing everything won’t save you. But this episode will give you the clarity you need to start 2026 right.

🎧 Listen to Adam's episode right now:

******************
EPISODE HIGHLIGHTS
******************

Hit play and you'll learn:

* The Nuisance Test to spot spam before you send it
* An 80/20 workflow where research does the heavy lifting
* A credibility-first opener that earns attention instantly
* A “short wins” format (with a specific sentence target), and
* How to use AI as a research helper for prospecting

If you’re planning new email sequences for January, listen now and steal the framework that drives 20% positive replies.

Listen to the episode ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ke89qDsgvbY&list=PLNc0nC3C2rRKsDEUg3BNDaNpgdnqBB5n6&utm_campaign=2025-12+Outfoxed%3A+Episode+five&utm_content=Adam+episode+%28community+plug%29&utm_medium=email_action&utm_source=customer.io )

How do you get a 20% positive reply rate from cold email in 2026?

The unobvious answer is: you stop acting like a “cold emailer.”

In Outfoxed episode 5, we sat down with Adam Goldfarb, and he shared the closest thing I’ve heard to a 2026 definition of doing cold email well: be an anti–cold emailer.

I recently wrote my full breakdown, and the point isn’t theory.

If a 20% reply rate sounds like your dream cold email performance, this blog turns Adam's process into practical experiments you can run in January to move your reply rates.

Read my biggest takeaways

 

Here’s what you’ll learn + test:

  1. The Nuisance Test (aka “is this spam?”): Adam’s definition is brutal: if your email is a nuisance, it’s spam. Read the blog for a simple scoring checklist to run before you hit send.
  2. The 80/20 rule: research beats writing: Spend 80% of your time finding the right people and 20% writing the email. I share a “micro-list sprint” you can run with 50 leads.
  3. Lead with credibility: Your opening sentence should prove you get their world. The blog includes a “credibility bank” framework you can build once and reuse.
  4. Shorter wins (3–4 sentences): Not “perfect copy.” Not a long pitch. Just enough to earn permission to continue. I share a clean structure you can A/B test.

If you’re rebuilding email sequences for 2026, this is a good reset, and I'm sharing exactly how you can do it:

Read how

Best,
James
Co-Host, Outfoxed

Title:Unveiling 2026: Revolutionizing Brand Discovery with AI-Driven Search

🔥 AI Search Optimization: The New Gateway to Brand Discovery 🔎

In a significant pivot for marketing automation, 2026 is set to be the year AI search becomes the primary bridge to brand discovery, with AI engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity taking the forefront. This shift prompts brands to focus on AIO (AI Optimization) over traditional SEO, according to recent insights from industry leaders.

### Key Takeaways:
1. **Dominating the AI Frontier**: As we move into 2026, the preparedness era is over. AI search now dictates first impressions, demanding brands optimize their visibility before they even hit Google search results [Birdeye][MarcomCentral].
   
2. **Revolutionizing Automation**: AI-driven reputation automation and autonomous listings management are becoming integral to workflow optimizations. These tools not only streamline processes but significantly enhance enterprise growth [Birdeye].
   
3. **Privacy-Centric Personalization**: Combining AI with real-time personalization, businesses must harness first-party data while vigilantly addressing privacy laws. This ensures proactive adaptation and effective communication across channels [Robotic Marketer][Quad].

With AI rapidly evolving as a core marketing structure, training these systems to embody brand tone is critical for creating self-optimizing campaigns. It's time to gear up and lead this transformation!

💬 What strategies are you deploying to optimize your brand's AI presence? Let's discuss!

Title:Unveiling 2026: Revolutionizing Brand Discovery with AI-Driven Search

🔥 AI Search Optimization: The New Gateway to Brand Discovery 🔎

In a significant pivot for marketing automation, 2026 is set to be the year AI search becomes the primary bridge to brand discovery, with AI engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity taking the forefront. This shift prompts brands to focus on AIO (AI Optimization) over traditional SEO, according to recent insights from industry leaders.

### Key Takeaways:
1. **Dominating the AI Frontier**: As we move into 2026, the preparedness era is over. AI search now dictates first impressions, demanding brands optimize their visibility before they even hit Google search results [Birdeye][MarcomCentral].

2. **Revolutionizing Automation**: AI-driven reputation automation and autonomous listings management are becoming integral to workflow optimizations. These tools not only streamline processes but significantly enhance enterprise growth [Birdeye].

3. **Privacy-Centric Personalization**: Combining AI with real-time personalization, businesses must harness first-party data while vigilantly addressing privacy laws. This ensures proactive adaptation and effective communication across channels [Robotic Marketer][Quad].

With AI rapidly evolving as a core marketing structure, training these systems to embody brand tone is critical for creating self-optimizing campaigns. It's time to gear up and lead this transformation!

💬 What strategies are you deploying to optimize your brand's AI presence? Let's discuss!

#MarketingAutomation #AIOptimization #BrandDiscovery #AIAgents #WorkflowEfficiency #CRMOptimization #NoCode #BusinessGrowth #PrivacyMatters #AIWorkflow

Тим часом ринок і метрики повертаються з канікул: 30,5 тис контактів на Джині цього тижня, на рівні листопада 2025.

В порівнянні з цифрами рік тому, кількість кандидатів майже без змін, а кількість вакансій зросла майже на 30%

C++ і мобільна розробка в топі попиту

Порахували, що у четвертому кварталі 2025 Індекс Djinni склав 0.29, тобто на кожні 100 відправлених відгуків кандидати отримують в середньому 29 пропозицій.

Найбільш зростання у мобільної розробки - Android/iOS i Flutter. Падіння року — це PHP, хоча його індекс досі вдвічі вищий, ніж в категорії Fullstack.

Єдина категорія розробки, де індекс не опускався нижче одиниці — це C++. Такі кандидати стабільно отримують більше пропозицій, ніж самі відгукуються.

Тим часом середні зарплати по наймах залишаються стабільними, за винятком категорії 5-6 років досвіду, де є непевне, але зростання.
